text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) النِّسَاءُ أَرْبَعٌ جَامِعٌ مُجْمِعٌ وَ رَبِيعٌ مُرْبِعٌ وَ خَرْقَاءُ مُقْمِعٌ وَ غُلٌّ قَمِلٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Salma Bin Al Khattab, from Suleyman Bin Sama’at, from Al Haza’a, from his uncle Aasim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The women are four (types) – An all inclusive goodness, and a child-bearing fountain, and a careless destructive one, and a feed for parasite’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Safmah ibn al-Khattab from Sulayman ibn Sama‘ah from al-Hadhdha’ from his uncle, ‘Asem who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ’Women are of four kinds: Goodness in all respects, a child bearing fountain, a dimwitted destructive one and feed for parasites.”’
